data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Improves navigation by placing important buttons and links in accessible locations on the page.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by reducing the number of choices presented to the user at any one time.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs interfaces familiar to users based on their previous experiences with similar platforms.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related elements together to create a logical structure that enhances navigation.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Prioritizes key products and offers by placing them in positions of attention on the webpage.
